ThingDef.label: ancient research notes
ThingDef.description: Little more than tattered, old loose documents with illegible writing and faded diagrams. A small amount of progress for the current research project can be instantly gained from reading this. It can only be used once.

ThingDef.label: ancient research book
ThingDef.description: A written manual that explains and illustrates various engineering concepts. A moderate amount of progress for the current research project can be instantly gained from reading this. It can only be used once.

ThingDef.label: ancient research drive
ThingDef.description: A well-preserved data storage device that contains schematics, experiment logs, and other useful research data. A good amount of progress for the current research project can be instantly gained from reading this. It can only be used once.

ThingDef.label: ancient research knowledge core
ThingDef.description: A valuable artifact that contains a thralled AI subpersona, which is highly knowledgeable in various technologies. A large amount of progress for the current research project can be instantly gained from reading this. It can only be used once.
